name: Sol's rng
description:
W.I.P.

A (kind of) working Sol's rng! It's a heavy work in progress but I want to be clear with what I want to add.

  1. Most of the auras from the game with a working luck system (or at least an illusion of it)

  2. Quest system

  3. Potion system as well as crafting system

  4. Somewhat more commands so you can have a sandbox in there too

  5. Somehow make events here (really not sure if the bot shall do them automatically or I should manually change em)

Next mechaince I am working on currently - Auras rarities and unique messages for each!

BOT IS NOT PLAYABLE WITH JLLM, USE PROXY OR ELSE IT'LL NOT WORK AS INTENDED. And please, don't leave bad reviews for JLLM bugging out, I can't fix an Ai itself.

How cruel, do you have no larp? Don't expect frequent updates, I am far too lazy.

Changelog

V1 - Release, like what else yo wanna here

V1.1 - Added some more auras, as well fixed some bugs with ui and biomes

V1.2 - Fully working shops and potion system, all auras up to Mythic rarity

V1.3 (Soon) - All of the Mythic (non special) auras, new biomes, new potions, code system, achievement system, unique message for each rarity aura rolled, summer event maybe
creator: Serios_man
